title: Keely Dominant Control PASS: 3 laws mapped to QA orbit hierarchy
_fixture_purpose: Certifies Keely's 3 dominant/control laws (Category 3, Vibes framework) as QA orbit hierarchy mappings. Law 1: invariant substrate. Law 11: triune manifestation of generator. Law 16: singularity as neutral center.

1.name: Law of Matter and Force
1.keely_text: There exists an infinite and unchangeable quantity of atomoles, the base of all matter; these are in a state of constant vibratory motion
1.qa_mapping: State space {1,...,N} is fixed and unchangeable — 81 states in mod-9. The generator always applies; states always evolve. The atomoles = irreducible integer pairs.
1.control_aspect: The substrate is invariant; what changes is the path through it

11.name: Law of Force
11.keely_text: Energy manifests itself in three forms: Creative, Transmissive, Attractive
11.qa_mapping: Three manifestations of the generator: (1) Creative = orbit classification, (2) Transmissive = generator propagation, (3) Attractive = resonance coupling
11.control_aspect: The triune manifestation of a single underlying operation (the generator)

16.name: Law of Oscillating Atomoles
16.keely_text: Atomoles oscillating at a uniform pitch produce the creative force Atomolity, whose transmissive form Gravism is propagated through more rarefied media
16.qa_mapping: Singularity (9,9) is the uniform pitch — unchanging fixed point, creative, the source from which other orbits are defined by departure. Gravism = attractive stability of singularity.
16.control_aspect: Singularity = dominant = neutral center = source of coherence

creative.description: Orbit classification itself — partitioning state space into singularity/satellite/cosmos

attractive.description: Resonance coupling between co-orbital states via tuple alignment

singularity_dominant.qa_property: T(9,9) = (9,9); unique element unchanged by generator

witnesses.note: 1+8+72=81: complete, no overlap, no gaps — atomoles are unchangeable

witnesses.attractive_result: coupling with (2,3): same orbit, high resonance
witnesses.note: Single generator operation manifests in three distinguishable ways
Only state unchanged by generator — the neutral center that anchors the entire orbit structure

cross_references.name: QA Septenary Cert
cross_references.relation: Unit group structure around neutral center
